facilities.name: Brookdale Boise Parkcenter
facilities.description: Brookdale Boise Parkcenter offers both independent living and assisted living on one campus along the Boise River greenbelt corridor in southeast Boise. Assisted living residents receive help with daily tasks such as bathing, dressing, and mobility, with staff available around the clock. The community is part of Brookdale Senior Living, the largest senior living operator in the United States.

facilities.name: Edgewood Meridian
facilities.description: Edgewood Meridian (licensed as Edgewood Spring Creek Meridian) offers independent living, assisted living, secured memory care, and short-term stays near Ten Mile Creek in Meridian. The state-licensed assisted living facility maintains 24-hour staffing, medication management, and on-site coordination of physical, occupational, and speech therapy. Its memory care neighborhood serves residents with Alzheimer's disease and other dementias, with secured, alarmed doors and a fenced outdoor area.

facilities.name: Touchmark at Meadow Lake Village
facilities.description: Touchmark at Meadow Lake Village is a full-continuum retirement community in Meridian, near Boise, offering independent living cottages and lodge homes, assisted living, memory care, and respite care. The campus lets residents move between levels of care as needs change. It is operated by Touchmark, a multi-state senior living company.

facilities.name: Grace Assisted Living - Nampa
facilities.description: Grace Assisted Living in Nampa offers independent retirement living and assisted living, plus Assist Plus memory care, respite day care, and hospice support, on Sunny Ridge Road overlooking Liberty Park. Care staff are available 24 hours a day under the supervision of a facility RN. Amenities include a hair salon, library, outdoor garden, communal dining hall, and swimming pool.

facilities.name: Fox Den Homes Bannock House
facilities.description: Fox Den Homes Bannock House is a cozy 8-bed residential assisted living and memory care home just west of downtown Boise. As a small residential care home, it emphasizes a lower caregiver-to-resident ratio and a personal, home-like feel compared with larger facilities. It is one of several small Fox Den Homes residences in the Treasure Valley.

facilities.name: Life Care Center of Idaho Falls
facilities.description: Life Care Center of Idaho Falls is a 109-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility on the east side of Idaho Falls. It provides post-acute skilled nursing and short-term rehabilitation, and holds a 5-star overall rating from the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services. The facility has participated in Medicare since 1981 and is part of Life Care Centers of America.

facilities.name: Twin Falls Transitional Care of Cascadia
facilities.description: Twin Falls Transitional Care of Cascadia is a 116-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility providing rehabilitation and long-term skilled nursing care in Twin Falls. The facility focuses on transitional, post-acute care for patients recovering after a hospital stay. It is operated by Idaho-based Cascadia Healthcare.

facilities.name: Creekside Inn
facilities.description: Creekside Inn is a dedicated memory care community in Coeur d'Alene designed exclusively for residents living with Alzheimer's disease, dementia, and other forms of memory loss. Licensed nurses are on site 24 hours a day, and staff use Humanitude care techniques. The community is located near medical facilities and is operated by Koelsch Communities, a family-owned multi-state senior living company.

facilities.name: Edgewood Spring Creek Fruitland
facilities.description: Edgewood Spring Creek Fruitland is an assisted living community in the small western Idaho town of Fruitland, licensed for traditional assisted living plus a secured memory care neighborhood for residents with Alzheimer's disease or other dementias. Services include 24-hour caregiver coverage, on-call nursing, medication administration, three daily meals, housekeeping, scheduled transportation, and coordination with visiting therapy and hospice teams.

facilities.name: Truewood by Merrill, Boise
facilities.description: Truewood by Merrill, Boise offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care in 109 apartments in northwest Boise's residential neighborhoods. The community includes cottages, studios, and one- and two-bedroom units with chef-prepared meals, on-site RN/LPN wellness staff, landscaped gardens, and walking paths. It is operated by Merrill Gardens, a Seattle-based senior living company founded in 1993.
facilities.review_note: 9.3/10 A Place for Mom review score based on 36 reviews in the last 2 years; 129 reviews all-time (July 2026)

facilities.name: Revel Eagle
facilities.description: Revel Eagle is a modern independent living community of 146 private residences on the Boise River and Greenbelt in Eagle, opened in late 2020. The four-story property offers studio, one- and two-bedroom apartments with restaurant-style all-day dining, a pub, theater, salon, and fitness center. It is a 2026 A Place for Mom Best of Senior Living award winner.
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 average across 85 reviews on A Place for Mom; 9.7/10 review score based on 35 reviews in the last 2 years (July 2026)

facilities.name: Autumn Wind Assisted Living & Memory Care
facilities.description: Autumn Wind Assisted Living & Memory Care sits among local farms in a residential Caldwell neighborhood, with 53 assisted living apartments and 22 private and semi-private apartments in its secure Expressions memory care neighborhood specializing in Alzheimer's and dementia care. Families consistently praise the compassionate staff, cleanliness, and home-like atmosphere.
facilities.review_note: 9.4/10 A Place for Mom review score; 43 reviews on its A Place for Mom listing with 67% 5-star ratings (July 2026)

facilities.name: Meadow View Assisted Living and Memory Care
facilities.description: Meadow View Assisted Living and Memory Care is a medium-sized senior living community in Emmett offering assisted living and memory care in a small-town Gem County setting.
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 average across 11 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Quinn Meadows Rehabilitation and Care Center
facilities.description: Quinn Meadows Rehabilitation and Care Center is a 41-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Pocatello offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term care. It holds a CMS overall rating of 5 out of 5 stars and a High Performing short-term rehabilitation rating from U.S. News, and has participated in Medicare since 2009. It is operated by Idaho-based Tanabell Health Services.

facilities.name: Lincoln Court
facilities.description: Lincoln Court is a Stellar Senior Living community in a quiet Idaho Falls neighborhood offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and respite stays.
facilities.review_note: 9.8/10 A Place for Mom review score; 79 reviews all-time with 84% 5-star ratings (July 2026)

facilities.name: MorningStar of Idaho Falls
facilities.description: MorningStar of Idaho Falls is a large campus offering independent living cottages and suites, assisted living, and memory care in its dedicated Reflections Neighborhood for residents with Alzheimer's and dementia.
facilities.review_note: 9.3/10 A Place for Mom review score; 45 reviews all-time (July 2026)

facilities.name: Pomerelle Place
facilities.description: Pomerelle Place is an assisted living community in Burley with 45 studio and one-bedroom apartments, staffed with a full-time nurse and around-the-clock caregivers for medication support and help with daily living.
facilities.review_note: 9/10 A Place for Mom review score; 25 reviews all-time (July 2026)

facilities.name: Heritage Assisted Living of Twin Falls
facilities.description: Heritage Assisted Living of Twin Falls is a 78-bed community with 62 assisted living beds and 16 dedicated memory care beds, and it accepts a limited number of Medicaid-covered residents.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 average across 12 reviews on A Place for Mom; 9.2/10 review score based on 5 reviews in the last 2 years (July 2026)

facilities.name: Avista Twin Falls
facilities.description: Avista Twin Falls is an assisted living community that earned a Gold Award in Idaho's Residential Assisted Living Facility Program with zero citations, placing it among the top tier of senior living communities nationwide.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 average across 67 reviews on A Place for Mom; 9.7/10 review score based on 27 reviews in the last 2 years (July 2026)

facilities.name: Guardian Angel Homes Post Falls
facilities.description: Guardian Angel Homes Post Falls is a campus of smaller residential-style homes — including the Tudor House, Timber House, The Cottage, and The Craftsman for residents with advanced Alzheimer's and dementia — plus The Inn, which offers larger suites for a more independent lifestyle. The Pacific Northwest operator provides care ranging from minimal assistance to specialized memory support.
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 average across 19 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: North Star Retirement Community
facilities.description: North Star Retirement Community offers independent living, assisted living, and respite care in Coeur d'Alene, operated by Stellar Senior Living. Residents and families consistently note the excellent meals, meticulous cleanliness, scenic location, and dedicated, professional staff.
facilities.review_note: 9.6/10 A Place for Mom review score based on 10 reviews in the last 2 years; 66 reviews all-time (July 2026)

facilities.name: The Bridge at Sandpoint
facilities.description: The Bridge at Sandpoint is an assisted living community named a 2022-2023 U.S. News & World Report Best Assisted Living community, and it shares a campus relationship with the adjacent Life Care Center of Sandpoint for skilled nursing and rehabilitation. Families praise staff who treat residents like family in a safe, engaging environment. It is part of the Century Park Associates portfolio.
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 average across 9 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Fairwinds - Sand Creek
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 44 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter (July 2026); U.S. News Best Senior Living for independent living and assisted living
facilities.description: Fairwinds - Sand Creek is a Leisure Care retirement community in Idaho Falls offering independent living and assisted living in apartment-style homes. U.S.

facilities.name: Karcher Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 5.0/5 from 13 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)
facilities.description: Karcher Senior Living (formerly Prestige Senior Living at Karcher Estates) is a retirement and continuing care community in the heart of Nampa offering independent living and assisted living with access to rehabilitation services.

facilities.name: Willow Park Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 67 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Willow Park Senior Living is a 124-unit community on North Milwaukee Street in Boise offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care with 24-hour awake staff.

facilities.name: Grace at Fairview Lakes
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 across 29 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter; 17 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)
facilities.description: Grace at Fairview Lakes is a Grace Assisted Living community in Meridian offering independent living, assisted living, and a dedicated memory care unit. Families praise the genuinely warm caregiving team, the personalized attention for residents with memory issues, and the clean, well-maintained campus.

facilities.name: Legends Park Assisted Living
facilities.review_note: 4.8 rating on AssistedLivingCenter; 9 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026); voted Best Assisted Living Community in Idaho
facilities.description: Legends Park Assisted Living is a 44-apartment assisted living community in Coeur d'Alene operated by Prestige Care, located across from the Kroc Center with trails adjacent to the property. Apartments include kitchenettes, barrier-free showers, and 24-hour emergency call systems, and the community has been voted Best Assisted Living Community in Idaho.

facilities.name: The Terraces of Boise
facilities.description: A nonprofit continuing care retirement community operated by HumanGood, offering residential/independent living, assisted living, memory care and a 48-bed Medicare-certified skilled nursing unit. The skilled nursing facility carries a CMS overall rating of 4 stars, with strong health-inspection and staffing scores. Set on the east side of Boise along Warm Springs Avenue.

facilities.name: Idaho State Veterans Home - Boise
facilities.description: A state-operated skilled nursing home for eligible Idaho veterans and their spouses, run by the Idaho Division of Veterans Services. The 122-bed facility holds a CMS overall rating of 5 stars. It provides long-term skilled nursing and rehabilitative care in northwest Boise.

facilities.name: Aspen Transitional Rehabilitation
facilities.description: A 30-bed skilled nursing and short-term rehabilitation facility in Meridian focused on post-acute recovery. It holds a CMS overall rating of 5 stars, with high nurse-staffing levels (about 4.7 nursing hours per resident day) and a strong return-to-home rate. Recognized by U.S. News as a Best Nursing Home for short-term rehabilitation.

facilities.name: Cascadia of Nampa
facilities.description: A 99-bed skilled nursing and short-term rehabilitation center in Nampa operated by Cascadia Healthcare. It carries a CMS overall rating of 4 stars, including a 5-star quality-measures score. Offers Medicare- and Medicaid-certified post-acute and long-term care.

facilities.name: Bridgeview Estates
facilities.description: A senior living campus in Twin Falls with independent living, assisted living and a 116-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation center. The skilled nursing facility holds a CMS overall rating of 3 stars and was named a U.S. News 2026 Best Nursing Home for short-term rehabilitation. Serves the Magic Valley region.

facilities.name: Life Care Center of Post Falls
facilities.description: A 120-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation center in Post Falls operated by Life Care Centers of America. It holds a CMS overall rating of 5 stars, with 5-star health-inspection and quality-measure scores, and was named a U.S. News 2026 Best Nursing Home. Provides short-term rehab and long-term skilled care.

facilities.name: Bingham Memorial Skilled Nursing & Rehabilitation
facilities.description: A 70-bed hospital-based skilled nursing and rehabilitation center attached to Bingham Memorial Hospital in Blackfoot. Nonprofit-affiliated, it holds a CMS overall rating of 5 stars and a High Performing short-term rehabilitation rating. Its on-campus hospital gives residents ready access to acute care.

facilities.name: Idaho State Veterans Home - Pocatello
facilities.description: A state-operated skilled nursing home for eligible Idaho veterans and their spouses in Pocatello, run by the Idaho Division of Veterans Services. The 66-bed facility holds a CMS overall rating of 5 stars with a High Performing long-term care rating. Provides long-term and rehabilitative skilled nursing care.

facilities.name: Temple View Transitional Care Center
facilities.description: A 119-bed skilled nursing and transitional-care center in Rexburg (formerly Rexburg Care and Rehabilitation Center). It holds a CMS overall rating of 3 stars, with a 5-star quality-measures score and 4-star staffing. Serves Madison County and the eastern Idaho region.

facilities.name: Life Care Center of Sandpoint
facilities.description: A 124-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation center in Sandpoint operated by Life Care Centers of America, serving Bonner County and north Idaho. It holds a CMS overall rating of 4 stars. Provides Medicare- and Medicaid-certified short-term rehab and long-term skilled care.

facilities.name: Idaho State Veterans Home - Lewiston
facilities.description: A state-operated skilled nursing home for eligible Idaho veterans and their spouses in Lewiston, run by the Idaho Division of Veterans Services. The 66-bed facility holds a CMS overall rating of 5 stars, with 5-star staffing. Provides long-term and rehabilitative skilled nursing care in the Lewiston-Clarkston valley.

facilities.name: Cascadia of Lewiston
facilities.description: A 34-bed skilled nursing and short-term rehabilitation center in Lewiston operated by Cascadia Healthcare, emphasizing private rooms with private baths. It holds a CMS overall rating of 5 stars. Located near St. Joseph Regional Medical Center and Tri-State Memorial Hospital.

facilities.name: Royal Plaza Health and Rehabilitation of Cascadia
facilities.description: A 63-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation center in Lewiston operated by Cascadia Healthcare. It holds a CMS overall rating of 4 stars, above the state and national averages. Provides Medicare- and Medicaid-certified post-acute and long-term skilled care.

facilities.name: Weiser Care of Cascadia
facilities.description: A 76-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation center in Weiser operated by Cascadia Healthcare, serving Washington County in western Idaho. It holds a CMS overall rating of 3 stars, including a 4-star quality-measures score. Provides Medicare- and Medicaid-certified post-acute and long-term care.

facilities.name: The Cottages at Columbia Village
facilities.description: An assisted living and memory care community in southeast Boise built as four 15-bed homes arranged around a central courtyard, offering a small-home, residential setting. Respite and adult day care are also available. Base rates start around $3,650/month for assisted living and $4,800/month for memory care.
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 60 reviews on A Place for Mom (2026)

facilities.name: Fox Den Homes at Summerset
facilities.description: Fox Den Homes at Summerset is a 9-bed residential assisted living home in Boise owned and operated by a nurse, part of the Fox Den Homes group of small dementia-capable care homes in the Treasure Valley. The small-home model provides a high caregiver-to-resident ratio in a home setting.
facilities.quality_basis: Nurse-owned 9-bed residential assisted living home in the well-regarded Fox Den Homes group; the group's flagship Bannock House is rated 9.1/10 on My Caring Plan and 4.2/5 across 16 A Place for Mom reviews (2026).

facilities.name: Fox Den Homes North End House
facilities.description: Fox Den Homes North End House is an 8-bed residential assisted living home in Boise's historic North End, owned and operated by a nurse. Part of the Fox Den Homes group, it offers personal care, medication management, meals, and 24-hour staffing in a small home environment.
facilities.quality_basis: Nurse-owned 8-bed residential assisted living home in the well-regarded Fox Den Homes group; the group's flagship Bannock House is rated 9.1/10 on My Caring Plan and 4.2/5 across 16 A Place for Mom reviews (2026).

facilities.name: Fox Den Homes Franklin House
facilities.description: Fox Den Homes Franklin House is a small residential care home in Boise specializing in memory care for individuals with Alzheimer's and dementia. It is part of the Fox Den Homes group, which operates several nurse-run small homes across the Treasure Valley emphasizing personalized care and a home-like setting.
facilities.quality_basis: Small memory-care home in the well-regarded Fox Den Homes group; the group's flagship Bannock House is rated 9.1/10 on My Caring Plan and 4.2/5 across 16 A Place for Mom reviews (2026).

facilities.name: Cenoma House
facilities.description: Cenoma House is a family-owned 10-bed residential care home in Twin Falls where residents receive a highly personalized level of care. Services include a 24-hour call system, assistance with bathing, dressing, transfers, medication management, and other activities of daily living.
facilities.quality_basis: Small (10-bed) family-owned residential care home described with a 4.9 rating and consistently positive reviews for its nurturing environment and personalized care (Seniorly, 2026); online review volume is low (1 review on Caring.com).

facilities.name: Desert Rose Retirement Estates
facilities.description: Desert Rose Retirement Estates is an 8-unit senior care home in Twin Falls licensed for up to 8 residents. The home provides assisted living and Alzheimer's care with activities and home-cooked meals in a small residential setting.
facilities.quality_basis: Small (8-bed) assisted living home reported at 5.0 out of 5 stars across 2 reviews on SeniorAdvice (2026); review volume is very low.

facilities.name: Briarwood Assisted Living of Rexburg
facilities.description: Briarwood Assisted Living of Rexburg is a small, home-style assisted living and memory care community described as a warm country home. Services include 24-hour trained and certified staff, an on-site nurse, medication assistance, a secured yard, and home health and hospice support.
facilities.quality_basis: Small home-style assisted living and memory care home with 3 positive reviews on Caring.com (2026) describing friendly, helpful staff and a homey feel, and regarded locally as one of the better southeast Idaho small homes.

facilities.name: Timber Springs Transitional Care
facilities.review_note: CMS overall star rating: 1 out of 5 (much below average), per Medicare Care Compare data cited by NursingHomeDatabase.com and ProPublica Nursing Home Inspect (as of July 2026). Recently acquired by The Ensign Group.
facilities.description: Timber Springs Transitional Care is a Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility in Boise with 120 certified beds. It offers short-term rehabilitation therapy and long-term skilled nursing care.

facilities.name: Ironwood Rehabilitation and Care Center
facilities.review_note: CMS overall star rating: 1 out of 5 (much below average) as of July 2026. CMS inspection records cite citations for failing to protect residents from abuse/neglect and failing to timely report and investigate suspected abuse, per multiple nursing-home-data aggregators summarizing federal inspection reports. Families should review the full CMS inspection report before considering this facility.
facilities.description: Ironwood Rehabilitation and Care Center is an 80-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Coeur d'Alene offering rehabilitation therapy and long-term nursing care.
facilities.serious_concern_note: State and federal inspection records document substantiated abuse and neglect citations.

facilities.name: Cascadia of Boise
facilities.review_note: CMS overall star rating: 2 out of 5 (below average). Sub-scores: health inspection 3 stars, staffing 1 star, quality measures 4 stars, as of July 2026 Medicare Care Compare data.
facilities.description: Cascadia of Boise is a 99-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility specializing in ventilator and tracheostomy care and rehabilitation. It carries a 2-star overall CMS rating, driven mainly by a 1-star staffing sub-score, even though its quality-measures sub-score is stronger at 4 stars. Families should ask directly about nurse staffing levels per shift.

facilities.name: Oak Creek Rehabilitation Center of Kimberly
facilities.review_note: CMS overall star rating reported as 2 out of 5 (below average) with sub-scores of health inspection 2 stars, staffing 2 stars, quality measures 4 stars, consistently repeated across multiple nursing-home data aggregators as of July 2026; some third-party sites showed conflicting overall figures (1 or 3), so families should confirm the current rating directly on Medicare Care Compare.
facilities.description: Oak Creek Rehabilitation Center of Kimberly is a 57-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Kimberly, near Twin Falls, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care. Aggregated CMS data most consistently shows a 2-star overall rating with below-average health-inspection and staffing sub-scores. Families should verify the current rating directly with Medicare Care Compare before enrolling.

facilities.name: Valley Vista Care Center of Sandpoint
facilities.review_note: CMS overall star rating: 1 out of 5 (much below average). Sub-scores: health inspection 1 star, staffing 4 stars, quality measures 2 stars, as of July 2026 Medicare Care Compare data.
facilities.description: Valley Vista Care Center of Sandpoint is a 73-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Sandpoint offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care. It carries a 1-star overall CMS rating, driven by a 1-star health-inspection sub-score, despite a stronger 4-star staffing sub-score.

facilities.name: Caldwell Care of Cascadia
facilities.review_note: CMS overall star rating: 1 out of 5 (much below average) as of July 2026 Medicare Care Compare data. A federal complaint investigation resulted in a $114,455 fine for failure to provide basic life support and failure to protect residents from abuse/neglect/exploitation, per nursinghomelawcenter.org's summary of CMS enforcement records (July 2026). The facility separately received a 2024 AHCA/NCAL Bronze quality-improvement award.
facilities.description: Caldwell Care of Cascadia is a 71-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.
facilities.serious_concern_note: CMS records show a federal fine of roughly $114,000 tied to documented quality-of-care deficiencies.

facilities.name: Silverton Health and Rehabilitation of Cascadia
facilities.review_note: CMS overall star rating: 1 out of 5 (much below average) as of July 2026 Medicare Care Compare data. Cited by nursinghomelawcenter.org as having repeat abuse-and-neglect findings in complaint and inspection reports.
facilities.description: Silverton Health and Rehabilitation of Cascadia is a 50-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Silverton, in the Silver Valley area of Shoshone County, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.
facilities.serious_concern_note: State and federal inspection records document repeat substantiated abuse and neglect citations.

facilities.name: Grangeville Health and Rehabilitation of Cascadia
facilities.review_note: CMS overall star rating: 4 out of 5 (above average), sub-scores health inspection 4 stars, staffing 3 stars, quality measures 2 stars, per Medicare Care Compare data (July 2026). IMPORTANT: nursinghomelawcenter.org's review of CMS federal inspection records cites a documented finding that residents were placed in immediate danger from physical, sexual, or mental abuse due to staff failing to protect residents and respond to allegations -- one of the most severe categories of CMS citation. We flag this explicitly: the numeric star rating alone does not reflect this history, and families should review the full inspection report.
facilities.description: Grangeville Health and Rehabilitation of Cascadia is a 60-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Grangeville, serving Idaho County, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.
facilities.serious_concern_note: Despite a current 4-star CMS overall rating, federal inspection records document a citation for placing residents in immediate danger from abuse — read the full inspection history, not just the star average.

facilities.name: Paradise Creek Health and Rehab of Cascadia
facilities.review_note: No single current CMS overall star number could be confirmed from available sources (U.S. News shows a short-term rehabilitation rating of 'Average' and long-term care rating of 'Below Average'). nursinghomelawcenter.org, summarizing CMS enforcement records, reports the facility has paid 15 fines totaling over $77,000 since 2023 for deficiencies related to quality of life, freedom from abuse or neglect, and infection prevention (as of July 2026). Families should look up the current CMS star rating directly on Medicare Care Compare (CCN 135067).
facilities.description: Paradise Creek Health and Rehab of Cascadia is a 64-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Moscow, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care.
facilities.serious_concern_note: Federal enforcement records document a pattern of fines since 2023 tied to quality-of-life and abuse/neglect-prevention deficiencies.

facilities.name: Applewood Assisted Living
facilities.review_note: 3.1/5 average 'overall experience' across 7 reviews (all-time) on A Place for Mom (July 2026).
facilities.description: Applewood Assisted Living is a small, 9-bed residential assisted living home in Boise, owned and operated by a registered nurse.

facilities.name: Ashley Manor - Cory Lane
facilities.review_note: 2.3/5 average 'overall experience' across 3 reviews (all-time) on A Place for Mom; A Place for Mom's proprietary score is 1/10 based on 1 review in the last 2 years (July 2026). A staffing-ratio concern was raised in at least one review (one caregiver reported covering full care for 9 residents with dementia plus meals and housekeeping), alongside other reviews praising the dining program and small-scale atmosphere.
facilities.description: Ashley Manor - Cory Lane is a small residential assisted living home in Boise, part of the multi-location Ashley Manor group. Families should tour and ask directly about current staffing ratios.

facilities.name: Caring Hearts Assisted Living
facilities.review_note: Mixed reviews with a low review count: 3 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026). Several reviewers praise the small, one-on-one setting and home-cooked food, but one detailed negative review reports no heat on part of the building for nine months, food mostly limited to sandwiches, an unaddressed odor issue, and advertised activities that were not actually held.
facilities.description: Caring Hearts Assisted Living is a small, 15-resident assisted living home in Pocatello offering one-on-one personal care.

facilities.name: Lily and Syringa Assisted Living
facilities.review_note: 3.8/5 across 13 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026); separately 5.0/5 across 2 reviews on SeniorAdvisor and a 5.0-out-of-5 all-time 'overall experience' average across 2 reviews on A Place for Mom. Review volume is thin on the higher-scoring platforms, so the Birdeye figure (more reviews, and below the 4.2 quality-tier threshold) is the more representative signal.
facilities.description: Lily and Syringa Assisted Living is a 24-unit assisted living and memory care community in Idaho Falls offering furnished and unfurnished private and shared rooms with home-cooked meals.

facilities.name: Copper Springs Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 3.7/5 average 'overall experience' across 37 reviews (all-time) on A Place for Mom (July 2026), below the site's 4.2 quality-tier threshold despite a substantial review count. Reviewers frequently praise attentive memory-care staff but also raise recurring concerns about management communication, staffing shortages, food variety, and transportation reliability.
facilities.description: Copper Springs Senior Living is an assisted living and memory care community in Meridian operated by Senior Lifestyle, with a dedicated memory-care neighborhood for residents with Alzheimer's disease and other dementias.

facilities.name: The Gables of Idaho Falls Assisted Living & Memory Care
facilities.review_note: 3.3/5 average 'overall experience' across 6 reviews (all-time) on A Place for Mom (July 2026). Review count is low, so this figure should be treated as a thin sample.
facilities.description: The Gables of Idaho Falls Assisted Living & Memory Care is a community in Idaho Falls offering both assisted living and dedicated memory care.

organizations.name: Edgewood Healthcare
organizations.description: Edgewood Healthcare, headquartered in Grand Forks, North Dakota, is the leading operator of senior living communities in the upper Midwest. The company owns and/or operates 64 independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities with over 4,100 beds across seven states, including several Spring Creek communities in Idaho's Treasure Valley and western Idaho.

organizations.name: Brookdale Senior Living
organizations.description: Brookdale Senior Living, headquartered at 111 Westwood Place in Brentwood, Tennessee, is the largest operator of senior housing in the United States, serving over 51,000 residents as of December 31, 2025. The publicly traded company operates 424 communities offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and continuing care across the country, including the Brookdale Boise Parkcenter campus in Idaho.

organizations.name: Koelsch Communities
organizations.description: Koelsch Communities is a family-owned senior living company founded in 1958 and headquartered in Olympia, Washington. It operates a portfolio of more than 40 communities across eight states, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care, including the Creekside Inn memory care community in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho.

organizations.name: Western States Lodging & Management
organizations.description: Western States Lodging & Management is a Utah-based hospitality and senior living operator, in business more than 25 years, that manages the Legacy House and Legacy Village brands of assisted living and memory care communities across Utah, Nevada, and Idaho.

organizations.name: Leisure Care
organizations.description: Leisure Care is a Seattle-based senior living company that has developed and managed retirement communities for over 30 years, operating roughly 50 independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities, largely in the western United States, under brands including Fairwinds.

organizations.name: Grace Assisted Living
organizations.description: Grace Assisted Living (Grace Senior Community) is an Idaho-based operator of independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities in the Treasure Valley, with locations including Meridian, Boise, Nampa, and Caldwell.

organizations.name: Prestige Care
organizations.description: Prestige Care is a family-owned senior care company based in Vancouver, Washington, operating skilled nursing centers and senior living communities across eight western states. Its portfolio includes assisted living communities such as Legends Park in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho.

organizations.name: Cascadia Healthcare
organizations.description: Cascadia Healthcare is an Idaho-based operator of skilled nursing and post-acute rehabilitation facilities across several western states. In Idaho it runs numerous centers, including Cascadia of Nampa, Cascadia of Lewiston, Royal Plaza Health and Rehabilitation of Cascadia and Weiser Care of Cascadia. The company focuses on short-term rehabilitation and long-term skilled nursing care.

organizations.name: Life Care Centers of America
organizations.description: Life Care Centers of America is a large privately held operator of skilled nursing, rehabilitation and senior living facilities nationwide. In Idaho it operates centers including Life Care Center of Post Falls, Life Care Center of Sandpoint and Bridgeview Estates. It provides short-term rehab and long-term skilled nursing care.

organizations.name: Idaho Division of Veterans Services
organizations.description: The Idaho Division of Veterans Services operates the state's veterans homes, which provide skilled nursing care for eligible Idaho veterans and their spouses. It runs the Idaho State Veterans Homes in Boise, Pocatello, Lewiston and Post Falls. The Boise, Pocatello and Lewiston skilled nursing homes each hold a CMS overall rating of 5 stars.

organizations.name: HumanGood
organizations.description: HumanGood is one of the largest nonprofit senior living organizations in the United States, operating life plan (continuing care retirement) communities and affordable housing. In Idaho it operates The Terraces of Boise, a continuing care retirement community. Its roots in senior care date to 1949.

organizations.name: Fox Den Homes
organizations.description: Fox Den Homes operates a small group of nurse-owned residential assisted living and memory care homes in Boise, each serving roughly 8-9 residents. The model emphasizes low caregiver-to-resident ratios and a home-like environment. Its flagship Bannock House is among the higher-rated small care homes in Boise.
